text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Takamatsunomiya Kinen has
come, and the stands are overflowing with
enthusiastic fans cheering for Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried the pressure might be too much for
her. In an attempt to reassure me, Fuji Kiseki
smiles brightly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And accidentally knocks a cup off a table. It's not
like her to be so clumsy, so I'm concerned about
this incident...
